title: Respond to customer needs and enquiries in an automotive workplace
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Respond to customer needs and enquiries in an automotive workplace demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify customer need or enquiry regarding product or service

pcs.text: Greet customer according to workplace procedures and customer service standards1.2 Identify and clarify customer requirement relating to specific product or service 1.3 Provide referrals to personnel where customer need or enquiry is outside scope of own responsibility or authority in line with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Greet customer according to workplace procedures and customer service standards1.2 Identify and clarify customer requirement relating to specific product or service 1.3 Provide referrals to personnel where customer need or enquiry is outside scope of own responsibility or authority in line with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Greet customer according to workplace procedures and customer service standards1.2 Identify and clarify customer requirement relating to specific product or service 1.3 Provide referrals to personnel where customer need or enquiry is outside scope of own responsibility or authority in line with workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify customer need or enquiry regarding product or service

elements.title: Provide information and advice to customer

pcs.text: Provide information that addresses customer need or enquiry in a timely, efficient and courteous manner to build a positive relationship and customer loyalty2.2 Ask questions to confirm that information satisfies customer need or enquiry2.3 Identify outstanding customer requirements and address promptly in a courteous and discreet manner, or refer to personnel in line with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide information that addresses customer need or enquiry in a timely, efficient and courteous manner to build a positive relationship and customer loyalty2.2 Ask questions to confirm that information satisfies customer need or enquiry2.3 Identify outstanding customer requirements and address promptly in a courteous and discreet manner, or refer to personnel in line with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide information that addresses customer need or enquiry in a timely, efficient and courteous manner to build a positive relationship and customer loyalty2.2 Ask questions to confirm that information satisfies customer need or enquiry2.3 Identify outstanding customer requirements and address promptly in a courteous and discreet manner, or refer to personnel in line with workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Provide information and advice to customer

elements.title: Finalise customer contact

pcs.text: Seek customer feedback about product or service and record as required according to workplace procedures3.2 Complete follow-up action effectively according to workplace procedures and timeframes3.3 Address customer complaints or dissatisfaction or escalate to personnel according to workplace procedures3.4 Conclude interaction with customer in line with workplace procedures and customer service standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek customer feedback about product or service and record as required according to workplace procedures3.2 Complete follow-up action effectively according to workplace procedures and timeframes3.3 Address customer complaints or dissatisfaction or escalate to personnel according to workplace procedures3.4 Conclude interaction with customer in line with workplace procedures and customer service standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek customer feedback about product or service and record as required according to workplace procedures3.2 Complete follow-up action effectively according to workplace procedures and timeframes3.3 Address customer complaints or dissatisfaction or escalate to personnel according to workplace procedures3.4 Conclude interaction with customer in line with workplace procedures and customer service standards.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Finalise customer contact

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
